The '''''Damocles''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']]. It was involved in the failed [[Battle of Halbara|attempt]] to destroy a Rebel convoy intending to deliver [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] to the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Damocles'' appeared in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' and shares its name with [[Wikipedia:Damocles|Damocles]], a character in [[Wikipedia:Hellenistic period|Hellenistic Greece]] and [[Wikipedia:Ancient Rome|ancient Rome]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
